concepts.label: Mole
concepts.definition: SI unit of amount of substance, 6.022e23 entities

concepts.label: Avogadro's Number
concepts.definition: 6.022e23, number of entities in one mole

concepts.label: Molar Mass
concepts.definition: Mass of one mole of a substance in g/mol

concepts.label: Molarity
concepts.definition: Concentration in moles of solute per liter of solution

concepts.label: pH
concepts.definition: Negative logarithm of hydrogen ion concentration

concepts.label: pKa
concepts.definition: Negative logarithm of acid dissociation constant Ka

concepts.label: Electronegativity
concepts.definition: Tendency of atom to attract shared electrons

concepts.label: Ionization Energy
concepts.definition: Energy to remove electron from gaseous atom

concepts.label: Covalent Bond
concepts.definition: Chemical bond by sharing electron pairs

concepts.label: Ionic Bond
concepts.definition: Chemical bond by electrostatic attraction of ions

concepts.label: Metallic Bond
concepts.definition: Delocalized electron sea bonding in metals

concepts.label: Hydrogen Bond
concepts.definition: Strong intermolecular force between H and F/O/N

concepts.label: Van der Waals Forces
concepts.definition: Weak intermolecular forces (London dispersion)

concepts.label: VSEPR Theory
concepts.definition: Predicts molecular geometry from electron pair repulsion

concepts.label: Hybridization
concepts.definition: Mixing of atomic orbitals to form hybrid orbitals

concepts.label: Le Chatelier's Principle
concepts.definition: System at equilibrium shifts to counteract disturbance

concepts.label: Hess's Law
concepts.definition: Total enthalpy change is independent of pathway

concepts.label: Ideal Gas Law
concepts.definition: PV = nRT

concepts.label: Arrhenius Equation
concepts.definition: k = A*exp(-Ea/RT), rate constant temperature dependence

concepts.label: Nernst Equation
concepts.definition: Relates electrode potential to concentrations

concepts.label: Gibbs Free Energy
concepts.definition: G = H - TS, criterion for spontaneity

concepts.label: Enthalpy
concepts.definition: H, heat content at constant pressure

concepts.label: Entropy
concepts.definition: S, measure of disorder/microstates

concepts.label: Activation Energy
concepts.definition: Minimum energy required for reaction to occur

concepts.label: Equilibrium Constant
concepts.definition: Ratio of products to reactants at equilibrium

concepts.label: Oxidation State
concepts.definition: Hypothetical charge if all bonds were ionic

concepts.label: Crystal Field Theory
concepts.definition: Explains colors and magnetism of transition metal complexes

concepts.label: Chirality
concepts.definition: Non-superimposable mirror image property

concepts.label: Aromaticity
concepts.definition: Cyclic conjugation with 4n+2 pi electrons (Huckel rule)

concepts.label: Resonance
concepts.definition: Delocalization of electrons described by contributing structures

concepts.label: Markovnikov's Rule
concepts.definition: H adds to less substituted carbon of alkene

concepts.label: Buffer Solution
concepts.definition: Solution resisting pH change upon acid/base addition

concepts.label: Titration
concepts.definition: Quantitative analysis by adding measured reagent to analyte

concepts.label: NMR Spectroscopy
concepts.definition: Nuclear magnetic resonance, determines molecular structure

concepts.label: IR Spectroscopy
concepts.definition: Infrared spectroscopy, identifies functional groups

concepts.label: Mass Spectrometry
concepts.definition: Measures mass-to-charge ratio of ions

concepts.label: Chromatography
concepts.definition: Separation technique based on differential partitioning

concepts.label: HPLC
concepts.definition: High-performance liquid chromatography

concepts.label: X-ray Crystallography
concepts.definition: Structure determination by X-ray diffraction

concepts.label: Colligative Properties
concepts.definition: Properties depending on solute particle count

concepts.label: Woodward-Hoffmann Rules
concepts.definition: Orbital symmetry controls pericyclic reactions

concepts.label: Amino Acid
concepts.definition: Building block of proteins, contains amino and carboxyl groups
